mapper.select: SELECT m.id, COALESCE(m.parent_id, 0) as parent_id, m.name, m.url, m.icon, m.sort_order, m.created_at, creator.username AS creator, m.updated_at, m.open_style, COALESCE(updater.username, 'Unknown') AS updater FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_user creator ON m.created_by = creator.id LEFT JOIN sys_user updater ON m.updated_by = updater.id ORDER BY m.sort_order

SELECT sm.id, COALESCE(sm.parent_id, 0) as parent_id, sm.name, sm.url, sm.icon, sm.sort_order, sm.open_style, srm.role_id IS NOT NULL AS checked FROM sys_menu sm LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id AND srm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY sm.sort_order

SELECT sm.id, COALESCE(sm.parent_id, 0) as parent_id, sm.name, sm.url, sm.icon, sm.sort_order, sm.open_style FROM sys_menu sm JOIN sys_role_menu srm ON srm.menu_id = sm.id
AND srm.role_id IN
#{roleId}
ORDER BY sm.sort_order
